Advanced Technical Manual.desc: A book that contains secrets of amazing technology. Use it to obtain a few Technology Points.

Ancient Civilization Core.desc: Core from technology that was lost long ago. Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

Aquatic Pal Fluids.desc: Bodily fluids taken from a Water Pal. Their high viscosity makes them a handy material.

Arrow.desc: Arrows for use with bows. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Beautiful Flower.desc: A plant that blooms colorful flowers. Can be used to make Suspicious Juice and Strange Juice.

Berry Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Red Berries. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be obtained when picking Red Berries.

Bone.desc: Bone collected from Pals. A valuable source of premium calcium.

Broncherry Meat.desc: Broncherry meat. Giant meat full of massive stores of energy. Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

Cake.desc: A dish eaten during celebrations.  Put it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.

Caprity Meat.desc: Caprity meat. Healthy and full of nutrients. Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

Caramel Cotton Candy.desc: Caramel cotton candy collected from Woolipop Terra. Its fluffy sweetness melts away in your mouth.

Carbon Fiber.desc: A lightweight yet sturdy material.  Used to create armor and other equipment. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Carrot.desc: A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable.  Not suitable for raw consumption.

Carrot Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Carrot. Necessary for starting a farm.

Cement.desc: Cement used for creating structures and more. Can be produced in a High Quality Workbench.

Charcoal.desc: Charcoal made from burning Wood. It can be combined with Sulfur to create Gunpowder.

Chikipi Poultry.desc: Chikipi meat. Light and easy to eat, it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

Chromite.desc: A type of metal buried underground.  It can be detected with a Metal Detector on certain islands.

Cloth.desc: Cloth woven from Wool.  Required to create armor. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Coal.desc: Coal often found in caves and other places. Required to create high quality metal.

Copper Key.desc: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

Coralum Ore.desc: A rare ore formed over countless years  in the deep sea.  Can be retrieved from the depths with  a magnet and fishing rod.

Cotton Candy.desc: Cotton candy collected from Woolipop. Its sweetness fluffily melts away in your mouth.

Crude Oil.desc: A material that can be processed into various products. Obtained by installing a Crude Oil Extractor in an oil field.

Dark Fragment.desc: Dropped by some powerful Dark Pals.  Used as a material for crafting powerful accessories and other items.

Dazzi Cloud.desc: Cloud dropped from a Dazzi. Soft and fluffy, it is used to make clothing.

Diamond.desc: A rare gemstone that glows brilliantly. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Dog Coin.desc: A mysterious coin. Apparently there are people who collect these. A Mimog will usually have them, but for some reason, they cannot be obtained by butchering it.

Egg.desc: Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals. Chikipi produce them.

Eikthyrdeer Venison.desc: Eikthyrdeer meat. Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

Electric Organ.desc: Material obtainable from Electric Pals. It stores electricity, but requires caution when used.

Elizabee's Staff.desc: A spear made from Elizabee's staff, altered for human use. It is imbued with Elizabee's indomitable spirit.

Emerald.desc: A gemstone that glows green. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Fiber.desc: Fiber collected from trees. A material used when creating bows, etc.

Flame Organ.desc: Material obtainable from Fire Pals. Can be used to make Fire Arrow and more.

Flour.desc: Flour made from grinding Wheat. It can be used as an ingredient in making Bread.

Galeclaw Poultry.desc: Galeclaw meat. Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

Giant Pal Soul.desc: The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Gloopie Tentacle.desc: Gloopie tentacle.  Known for its springy texture and light, refined flavor.

Gold Coin.desc: Currency traded on Palpagos Island. Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

Gumoss Leaf.desc: Leaf dropped from a Gumoss. Fresh and sticky, it is used to make clothing.

Gunpowder.desc: Gunpowder used to fire ammunition. Required to make bullets.

Hallowed Bar.desc: [Tides of Terraria]  A sacred material infused with divine energy.  Can be used to create a variety of Terraria items.

Hardwood.desc: High-quality wood carefully selected from sturdy trees grown in harsh environments such as deserts, volcanic regions, and snowy mountains.

Hexolite.desc: An alloy of Chromite and Hexolite Quartz.  Used for building advanced equipment and structures. Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace.

Hexolite Quartz.desc: A rare crystal found only in Feybreak.  Over many years, Paladium has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

High Quality Cloth.desc: High Quality Cloth woven from a large amount of Wool.  Required to create high quality armor. Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench.

High Quality Pal Oil.desc: High-quality oil that can be extracted from Pal. Necessary for making Polymer.

High Quality Recovery Meds.desc: Medicine that heals wounds over time. High quality; restores a lot of Health.

Honey.desc: Honey harvested from Beegarde. It's sweet and tasty.

Horn.desc: Horn collected from Pals. Used to create medicines and more.

Ice Organ.desc: Material obtainable from Ice Pals. Can be used to make Ice Mine and more.

Ingot.desc: A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore using a furnace.

Innovative Technical Manual.desc: A book that contains secrets of cutting-edge technology. Use it to obtain Technology Points.

Jelliette Bell Flesh.desc: Jelliette's fleshy bell.  Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully chewy bite.

Jellroy Bell Flesh.desc: Jellroy's fleshy bell.  Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully plump texture.

Katress Hair.desc: Hair dropped from a Katress. Soft and supple, it is used to make clothing.

Killamari Tentacle.desc: Tentacle dropped from a Killamari. Strange in texture, it is used to make clothing.

Lamball Mutton.desc: Lamball meat. Red meat with a unique flavor. Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

Large Pal Soul.desc: A spirit left behind by a large Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Leather.desc: Leather taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material. It can be obtained from certain Pals.

Leezpunk Crest.desc: Crest dropped from a Leezpunk. Sharp and pointy, it is used to make clothing.

Lettuce Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Lettuce. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Low Grade Medical Supplies.desc: Low Grade Medical Supplies good for Sick, Sprain, and Overfull. They don't heal Health when eaten, however.

Mammorest Meat.desc: Mammorest meat. With massive size comes massive flavor. Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

Medium Pal Soul.desc: A spirit left behind by a Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Memory Wiping Medicine.desc: A potion that allows the player to reset their status points when consumed. It has no effect if consumed by a Pal.

Meteorite Fragment.desc: Fragment of a rock from outer space. Contains large amounts of Paldium Fragment, which can be extracted by placing it in a Crusher.

Milk.desc: Drink it as is, or use it in various meals. Can be milked from Mozzarina.

Mozzarina Meat.desc: Mozzarina meat. Thick, juicy and marbled. Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

Munchill Meat.desc: Munchill meat.  Has a satisfying chew that brings out layers of umami as you eat.

Mushroom.desc: A mushroom that can be eaten raw. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Mysterious Mushroom.desc: Mushrooms that are not suitable for eating raw. Eating makes one more prone to feeling hungry.

Nightstar Sand.desc: Sand that can be found in the desert at night.  Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

Onion Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Onion. Necessary for starting a farm.

Ore.desc: Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace. Can be found in caves and other places.

Pal Metal Ingot.desc: A material required to create Pal Metal weapons and armor.  Strengthened by creating an alloy incorporating Paldium.

Paldium Fragment.desc: Crystallized energy from the World Tree. Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

Penking Plume.desc: Plume dropped from a Penking. Bright and colorful, it is used to make clothing.

Plasteel.desc: Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal. Can be produced in a Electric Furnace.

Polymer.desc: Polymer made from refined oil.  Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Potato Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Potato. Necessary for starting a farm.

Pure Quartz.desc: Pure Quartz often found in snowy fields and similar places. Required to create Circuit Board.

Raw Dumud.desc: Dumud meat. Fatty with a rich taste. Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

Raw Kelpsea.desc: Kelpsea meat. Tender and slightly sweet. Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

Red Berries.desc: A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Refined Ingot.desc: A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore and Coal using a furnace.

Reindrix Venison.desc: Reindrix meat. Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures. Takes a very long time to spoil.

Ribbuny Ribbon.desc: Ribbon dropped from a Ribbuny. Cute in color and design, it is used to make clothing.

Ruby.desc: A gemstone that glows red. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Rushoar Pork.desc: Rushoar meat. Full of the delicious flavors of wild game. Juicy and nutritious.

Sapphire.desc: A gemstone that glows blue. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Silver Key.desc: A key that can be used to open locked treasure chests.

Skutlass Sashimi.desc: Raw slices of Skutlass.  Characterized by its supple, plump flesh. Caution is required when preparing it due to its sword-like spine.

Small Pal Soul.desc: A spirit left behind by a small Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power.

Soralite.desc: A rare ore produced only in Sunreach. Within its host rock of overwhelming density resides a mysterious pattern and radiance.

Stone.desc: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by mining rocks.

Strange Juice.desc: Juice that greatly improves mood when consumed. Drinking it significantly increases work speed for a period of time, but significantly lowers SAN.

Sulfur.desc: Sulfur that can be found in volcanoes and such. Necessary for making Gunpowder.

Suspicious Juice.desc: Juice that improves mood when consumed. Drinking it increases work speed for a period of time, but lowers SAN.

Swee Hair.desc: Hair dropped from a Swee. Fluffy and soft, it is used to make clothing.

Thermal Core.desc: A high-temperature reaction core containing vast thermal energy. Used as a power component in advanced devices. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Tocotoco Feather.desc: Feathers dropped from a Tocotoco. Used to make clothing, as the beautifully vivid colors are quite popular.

Tomato Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Tomato. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Training Manual (XL).desc: Training manual that grants a substantial amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Venom Gland.desc: Material obtainable from poisonous Pals. Can be used to make Poison Arrow and more.

Wheat.desc: An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes. Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

Wheat Seeds.desc: Seeds that produce Wheat. Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Wood.desc: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by cutting trees.

Wool.desc: Material sheared from sheep Pals. A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.

Baked Berries.desc: Cooking enhances their nutritional value, and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

Baked Mushroom.desc: Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value. Curiously, it's also quite filling.

Bio Battery.desc: A device that stores bio-energy as electrical power. Used for equipment requiring high energy density. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Bread.desc: Bread made from baked Flour. A tasty staple food.

Broiled Dumud.desc: Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce. Soothes both mind and body. Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

Broncherry Fried Noodles.desc: A dish made by stir-frying noodles with vegetables and meat.  The rich seasoning pairs perfectly with the thick cuts of meat. Eating it will increase your Attack by 20% for a period of time.

Broncherry Rib Roast.desc: Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds. Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone, making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

Carbonara.desc: A dish mixing pasta with Egg and Milk. Eating it makes it improves Defense by +20% for a period of time.

Chikipi Sauté.desc: Plump poultry sautéed in butter. Accented with fresh lemons. Eating it will slightly increase work speed for a period of time.

Circuit Board.desc: Required to create precision equipment. Can be made with a Production Assembly Line.

Computer.desc: A component used in the control of automated equipment and precision machinery. It's a key component forming the foundation of modern technology. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Coralum Ingot.desc: An alloy made from Coralum Ore found on the ocean floor.  Highly resistant to energy, making it ideal for crafting weapons. Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace.

Corrosive Solvent.desc: A dangerous chemical solvent with strong decomposing properties. Used for precision processing and special treatments. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Cryogenic Coolant.desc: A high-efficiency cooling medium made from special components derived from Pals. Used to regulate temperature in high-output devices. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line.

Dumud Chowder.desc: Dumud lavishly covered in a thick, creamy soup. Eating it will increase work speed and stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

Eikthyrdeer Loco Moco.desc: Thick hamburger steak accented with a creamy fried egg. This sublime combination brings pure joy to the mouths of those who eat it. Eating it will increase Attack by +20% for a period of time.

Eikthyrdeer Stew.desc: A tender, melt-in-your-mouth venison stew crafted with love. The intertwining flavors of vegetables and meat create a harmonious blend that brings out a comforting richness. Eating it will increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

Extravagant Vegetable Cake.desc: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Mutations are more likely to occur, and talents will grow more easily.

French Fries.desc: A dish made by deep-frying Potato.  Once you start eating, you can't stop. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

Fried Chikipi.desc: Magnificently juicy poultry. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

Fried Egg.desc: An Egg now fried and even more delicious. Great for keeping hunger away.

Fried Gloopie Balls.desc: Gloopie Tentacle encased in a Flour dough and grilled into round bites.  Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

Fried Kelpsea.desc: Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness. Eating it will increase Defense by +10% and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

Galeclaw Nikujaga.desc: A dish made by simmering meat and potatoes in a sweet and savory sauce.  It has a mysteriously nostalgic taste. Eating it will increase your Defense by 25% for a period of time.

Gratin.desc: A dish made by coating potatoes with sauce and baking them to perfection.  Best enjoyed hot and fresh. Eating it will provide lasting fullness and increase your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

Grilled Chikipi.desc: Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire. Light and refreshing on the tongue.

Grilled Galeclaw.desc: Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

Grilled Kelpsea.desc: Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire. Plump and juicy.

Grilled Lamball.desc: Marinated mutton slow-cooked over a grill. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Herb Roasted Caprity.desc: Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of herbs and berries embedded in the meat. Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

Herb Roasted Lamball.desc: Indulging in an abundance of fresh berries creates a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton. Eating it will increase Defense by +10% for a period of time.

High Quality Wooden Board.desc: Fine planks carefully carved from Hardwood. They have beautiful wood grain and are used for structures with a luxurious feel. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II.

Hot Milk.desc: Even more delicious when warmed up. Great for keeping hunger away.

Jam-Filled Bun.desc: Bread with jam spread on it. The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

Jelliette's Jiggly Jelly.desc: An unusual treat crafted from Jelliette Bell Flesh and Aquatic Pal Fluids.  Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

Jellroy's Jolly Jelly.desc: An unusual treat crafted from Jellroy Bell Flesh and Red Berries.  Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase Defense by +10% for a period of time.

Lamball Kebab.desc: Spiced and roasted mutton. Deeply complex with unique flavors.

Mammorest Curry.desc: A dish made by simmering vegetables and meat with spices.  The rich flavor is highlighted by large chunks of tender meat. Eating it will increase your Attack by 25% for a period of time.

Mammorest Steak.desc: Boasts a rich and dignified flavor. Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

Marinated Mushrooms.desc: A dish made by marinating Mushrooms in a marinade. Eating it improves Defense by +10% for a period of time.

Minestrone.desc: A soup simmered with a variety of vegetables.  Drinking it warms you to the core. Eating it will increase your work speed for a period of time.

Mozzarina Cheeseburger.desc: Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine. Eating it will increase Attack by +20% and stay full longer for a period of time.

Mozzarina Hamburger.desc: The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweetness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece. Eating it will increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Mozzarina Steak.desc: Thick, well-done steak. Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

Munchill Steak.desc: Charcoal-grilled to perfection, this steak offers a crispy exterior and melt-in-your-mouth juiciness.  Unique compounds seal in flavor and enhance shelf life.

Mushroom Cake.desc: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. The talents of the resulting Pals will grow slightly more easily.

Mushroom Quiche.desc: A dish made by baking a pastry crust filled with eggs, vegetables, mushrooms, and cream.  It’s delicious even when cooled. Eating it will help you stay fuller for a while and make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

Mushroom Soup.desc: Cream soup made of Mushrooms. Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

Mythical Wooden Board.desc: Planks made by processing mystical wood, emitting a faint light. They contain power beyond human understanding and make an ideal core material.

Nail.desc: Necessary for building various facilities. Can be made with a Primitive Workbench.

Omelet.desc: A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup. Eating it improves Attack by +10% for a period of time.

Paloxite Ingot.desc: An indomitable alloy created by fusing Soralite and Paloxite. A highly rare material, crystallizing the technology of ancient civilization and the power of the World Tree. It is vital for crafting the highest-grade equipment and structures.

Pancake.desc: A dish made by mixing Flour and Milk together then baking. Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

Pizza.desc: A dish made by piling Red Berries, Tomato and cheese on Bread. Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

Reindrix Stew.desc: Stewed vegetables and venison that was reared in a frigid environment. The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness. Eating it will stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

Roast Eikthyrdeer.desc: Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes, accented by the aromas of the deep forest. Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

Roast Reindrix.desc: When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature. This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time, making it a perfect emergency ration.

Roast Rushoar.desc: Boar grilled over a hearty flame. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

Rushoar Bacon 'n' Eggs.desc: The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors. Eating it will increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

Rushoar Gyoza.desc: A dish made by wrapping a filling of mushrooms and meat in wheat flour and boiling it. The chewy texture is irresistible.  Eating it improves your Attack by 10% for a period of time.

Rushoar Hot Dog.desc: Thick sausage wedged between warm buns. The crisply seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for. Eating it will increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

Salt-Grilled Skutlass.desc: Fresh fillets of Skutlass salted and grilled into a simple dish. When eaten, it nullifies knockback and flinching for a certain period of time.

Seafood Pasta.desc: Fresh pasta is tossed with fragrant seafood in this exceptional dish, using Gloopie tentacles to elevate it even further. When eaten, it nullifies damage from explosions for a certain period of time.

Seafood Salad.desc: A healthy salad made with Gloopie Tentacle and Lettuce. Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

Soralite Ingot.desc: An ancient metal refined from ore that slumbers in Sunreach.  A rare processed material, forming the foundation of high-grade equipment and structures. Can be refined at Ancient Furnace.

Special Cake.desc: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. More likely inherit multiple passive skills from their parents.

Spring Rolls.desc: A dish made by wrapping vegetables and mushrooms in a thin skin and deep-frying them.  The crispy texture is delightful. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease and increase your Attack by 10% for a period of time.

Stewed Galeclaw.desc: Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors. Eating it will make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Stir-Fried Vegetables.desc: A dish made by stir-frying Carrot and Onion.  A simple and delicious way to enjoy vegetables. Eating it will slightly increase your work speed and improve your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

Vegetable Cake.desc: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Lay eggs twice at once.

Wooden Board.desc: Planks made from processed wood for easier use. More versatile than raw logs, with a wide variety of uses. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench.

Ancient Pal Manuscript.desc: An ancient manuscript written on Pal hide. It may be found by Pals during expeditions.  Required for advancing research.

Cavern Mushroom.desc: Mushroom that grows prolifically in caves. Can be made into healing medicine.

Lettuce.desc: A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must. It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

Mythical Wood.desc: Rare wood imbued with the power of the World Tree. Only skilled craftsmen are able to process it.

Onion.desc: A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history.  Not suitable for eating raw.

Paloxite.desc: Energy leaking from the World Tree that has crystallized after many years.  Those without protection who touch it will instantly rust and decay. Only those who can master its delicacy can reach the pinnacle of ancient technology.

Potato.desc: A hardy and filling crop that grows in any terrain.  Not suitable for raw consumption.

Tomato.desc: A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish. Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.
